_meta.name: okta-list-apps
_meta.description: List all active app integrations in the Okta admin console.
anomalies: perceive required instead of read — SPA issue

Table has empty headers [] — apps rendered as MUI cards not a standard <table>. perceive counts 5 'rows' but no column headers. Use mainActions to discover app instances (hrefs: /admin/app/{type}/instance/{id}/).
ACTIVE/INACTIVE counts shown as 'ACTIVE0', 'INACTIVE0' concatenated — badge text appended to label with no separator

chain.note: App names and instance hrefs appear in mainActions. Pattern: {href: '/admin/app/{type}/instance/{instanceId}/', text: 'App Name'}. Default trial org has 5 built-in apps: Okta Admin Console, Okta Browser Plugin, Okta Dashboard, Okta Workflows, Okta Workflows OAuth.

app-list-table.description: App card list — perceive sees it as a table with empty headers
app-list-table.note: App entries are in mainActions with href pattern /admin/app/{type}/instance/{id}/

create-app-integration.description: Button to create a new OIDC/SAML app integration

browse-app-catalog.description: Link to browse prebuilt app catalog
